INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Thu, 19 Feb 2026 08:36:23 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 320 | Critical: 31 | High: 47 | Medium: 199 | Low: 43

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [GLOBAL] South Korea’s ex-president escapes death sentence in martial law trial (Financial Times)
  [UKRAINE] A collection of our most interesting news and articles from yesterday, which you might have missed: – The KKamadze drones “Geran-2” now have the ability to launch FPV drones (MilInfoLive [tg:ru_milblog])
  [MIDDLE EAST] LIVE: South Korea convicts ex-President Yoon Suk Yeol for insurrection (Al Jazeera)
  [EAST ASIA] South Korea’s ex-president Yoon sentenced to life in prison for insurrection (SCMP)
  [MIDDLE EAST] South Korea’s ex-President Yoon given life in prison for insurrection (Al Jazeera)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (82 events, 11 critical, 7 high):
    - LIVE: South Korea convicts ex-President Yoon Suk Yeol for insurrection
    - South Korea’s ex-President Yoon given life in prison for insurrection
    - US said planning to withdraw all American troops from Syria over next two months
  Ukraine/Russia (77 events, 3 critical, 18 high):
    - Enemy wounds two residents of Donetsk region
    - A collection of our most interesting news and articles from yesterday, which you might have missed: – The KKamadze drones “Geran-2” now have the ability to launch FPV drones
    - War update: 237 clashes on front line over past day, Huliaipole and Pokrovsk sectors remain most active
  Europe (8 events, 4 critical, 2 high):
    - ‼️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 The United States is interested in lifting sanctions against Russia, due to the benefits that such projects could bring – Dmitriev
    - This winter, it’s the most significant event in the documentary world
    - The governor of Belgorod Oblast: There are new damages to the energy facility
  Global (77 events, 4 critical, 12 high):
    - Shipwrecks, Sham Papers and False Flags: Tracking the Company Behind It All
    - South Korea’s ex-president escapes death sentence in martial law trial
    - How does a family with growing children and two parents who are both military personnel, participants in combat operations, manage their lives

Sources: Jerusalem Post, GDELT, Bellingcat, Al Jazeera, MilInfoLive [tg:ru_milblog], SCMP, Ukrinform, Guardian Middle East, Washington Post World, Financial Times, Ukrainska Pravda, Colonelcassad [tg:ru_milblog], Times of Israel, BBC World, ASTRA Independent [tg:ru_milblog], Google News Reuters Africa, Google News Reuters World, WarGonzo [tg:ru_milblog], TFR/Airspace Closure News, AMK Mapping [tg:mapping], DoD News, Guardian Ukraine, NYT Middle East, Google News Reuters ME, Defense News, Military Times, The War Zone, RV Voenkor [tg:ru_milblog], Google News Kyiv Independent, Operatyvnyi ZSU [tg:ua_osint], Supernova+ [tg:ua_osint], CYPERSPEC Air/UAV [tg:air_defense], Google News Reuters Ukraine, Breaking Defense, NYT World, USNI News, Foreign Policy, The Diplomat, War on the Rocks, Google News Middle East, Defense One, Two Majors [tg:ru_milblog], Kalibrated Analysis [tg:satellite], Readovka [tg:ru_milblog], Rybar [tg:ru_milblog], Defence Blog, Azov Brigade [tg:ua_frontline], Long War Journal, ATESH Partisan Movement [tg:ua_intel], Ukrainian Witness [tg:air_defense], Google News Ukraine, Google News CENTCOM, SBU Security Service [tg:ua_intel]
